title: podocarpium fallax
intro: Podocarpium fallax, also known as the Chinese podocarpus, is a type of plant that belongs to the family Podocarpaceae and is native to China. The plant is used in traditional Chinese medicine, and its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Podocarpium fallax include reducing fever, relieving coughs and respiratory issues, and aiding in the treatment of various gastrointestinal problems. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
